reviews.review_description: It Is A Scary Game With Monsters (I Hope They Add One Where You Turn Into A Monster And Chase Your Friends) It Has Some Bugs But Really Good, To Be Fair It Is In Early Access (Hey You Reading My Review Use Codes OG OGDREAMER DREAMER AND MOGGIVR FOR DREAMER COINS IN THE SHOP (Go Into The Computer Go To The Maps Thingy Go To Shop And Touch The Door)

This game is a fun backrooms game that you can play with friends. Some cool features are that you have to find keys to beat levels, and the monsters are good quality, same with the game. Some improvements it could have are staying in the same lobby once you die, so you don't leave your friends. Also after every level that is beaten you get revived. Overall I loved this game.

one of the best horror vr games i've played through my vr history. the good things about the game is that the maps, details and lighting is amazing. the thing i dont like about the game is that on the pools level the monsters arent really that scary and its not quite fun.

overall the game is doing great!

This is one of the best Dreamcore game's I've ever played. The design of these levels are amazing, the puzzles are challenging but great, and the monsters are actually scary, especially the level 94 ones.I think you should add an easier way to use the computer though, and I think you should nerf level 94. You should also add that mushroom level with the checkered floor, a mask with a yellow happy face on it, and add level 188. Other than that, this is one of the best Dreamcore game's out there. I would definitely recommend this game to other people!

This game has so much potential, is it realistic No but who cares the game is amazing my favorite level was the one with the houses. I am very  glad to be OG i would like if they added resources like almond water that you can buy pre-game that will help you in the game. Overall very good game

I really loved this game. The design and the models are wonderful. My only issue is with the second level. I think the monster is way too fast, and every time the team dies, we have to create a new code all over again. This can be frustrating and slows down the gameplay. Other than that, it’s a fantastic game.

This game is genuinely a fun experience to play with friends

1 its scary in alot of aspects
The monsters speed/attack is perfectly balanced
AND if you die you spectate and get revived next level
Thats awesome
The devs and mods are awesome people
Defo recommend playing

this game was so fun with the dreamcore type and everything! im inlove with it honestly. It was the best! the surviving and the overall beautifulness of the game just really makes me stop and look around me to enjoy this games beauty. i need more games like this!

This game is sooo fire it’s like a dream core game and it’s SUPER fun and scary and fun to play with friends! ITS WORTH GETTING!!! You should get the game before the Og is gone!!!! FIRE GAME! All you do is got to different levels and that's what I enjoy going to different levels and playing with my friends to get funny moments in there and have fun and its super fun and I like how its scary and sometimes it gets hard. They should add to the game is some more scary monsters and maps like the wing eyes and more stuff to buy at the shop!

I love this game so much its barely humanly possible, I've been waiting for a great vr game on backrooms with puzzles 
And fun mechanics. And this game met each one of my demands! So thank you to the dreamy devs [ which i got to play with one ] for bringing me this awesome game. So thank you so much for the awesome game! [ also here for the giveaway!]

Very fun to replay and clever levels. Exactly what a dreamcore game should be, from the identical houses on the grassy hills to the mysterious and unpredictable pools. I had a blast beating this for the first time and as much fun the second. An idea would be to make a level select that unlocks the farther you progress

I loved how fun it is and entertaining to play with friends. This game looks like it will, go far I was here before the game was released and when it released I knew it would be good and I love how the monsters sometimes scare the crap out of me and I can’t wait till they add more levels and I completed the game and even made a Channel about this game keep up the good work

As a Moderator for the game, I am happy that the game came out for free for anyone to play, I really enjoyed the game and I am hoping you do the same, Thank you for playing and I hope you have a good time playing it solo or with your friends!

- Water
since i love dreamcore stuff and vr its like a perfect mix of the two things i love and the levels are super fun and can be challenging to beat, the levels are fun to play with friends.

The game is pretty good and the levels are great textures are realistic the monsters look cool I would like to see more levels come to this game when you have to find the correct code that's cool the content is amazing would love to see more people make videos on this game but it's kinda buggy but that's really it
Game runs pretty smooth needs a lot of work but it’s awsome!
The game is super fun the levels are hard but not to hard to beat and I would love to play more levels when they come out!
i have a lot of fun playing this and meeting people, oh yeah please add a camera for content creators

The hame is realy good, its the perfect mix of scary and adventure, i highly recommed giving it a try

5/5
Once I learned how to beat the game, I started speedrunning it over and over again. Please add more levels. Overall, its fun.
In just a matter of ONE year, Traxzz Studios have made TWO bangers. Keep up the GREAT work! 💪💯
I love how the monsters look and how fun it is to play with other people in this game
This is a great game with a nice liminal feeling to it and it has active servers
For just being released it’s very enjoyable needs some work but great game
Really good game short but good you could make the monsters in level 2 slower but other than that it's fine
I like game fun a lot i play with kirbs and history and other people and game is really fun❤️❤️❤️
yeah the publics do not work  pls help me
it seems like a cool game but i cant join multiplayer
The Game, and Levels Are Overall Pretty Good and the Quality On them are Pretty Good too🔥
This gane is very fun and overall the best backrooms game I’ve played I recommend!
cool game I would play it
i love how well they use dreamcore in this its just amazing cant wait to see more
i love this game even  tho its in early dev i think its so FUN to play with my friends!
I was really excited for this game but when I got in it felt like a gorilla tag slop game. You guys pulled a beyond sandbox.
this game is amazing and kirbs is my boyfriend

This game is very fun but also very buggy my hole team got kicked out after the poolrooms level any help on why that happened also sometimes joining the code wouldn’t work took about 15min if you can tell me what happened and if and devs see this can you bug test the game more anyways bye!!!!
This game is truly great. I really enjoy playing it with my friends and I also enjoy playing in the events that the developers host every so often. Please try out this game, it’s so much fun!

This game is really fun and scary something we really need in VR and this game is giving it to us. In my opinion the best horror kind of backrooms game I ever played. It's also really original wich I like about the game, that's it cya

I love the aspect of how it's a backrooms themed horror game and it is very fun. The only problems I have with it is that the quality of the monsters need a bit more work. With all of that said I can't wait for more levels and players to start playing!
Yo Ik it’s not as popular some of the other games, but this has potential to be like the most popular VR game ever
Its a very good high quality game but i should suggest harder and bigger levels and just more levels good job tho on this game👍
I played the public beta events on this game and it was so peak so had to try out the whole finished game and it is PEAK

reviews.review_title: One of the BEST Dreamcore games.
reviews.review_description: This game is the perfect combo of puzzles and horror, and makes you feel like you're literally outside of reality. One of the best upcoming Dreamcore games I have ever played.
Genuinely one of the BEST dreamcore games on vr!!!!!!!!

Really fun game with friend and it is scary but smooth though
